name: Comms Dashboard — All Sources
description: Polls Outlook, Teams, Gmail (OAuth2), Google Calendar, and Zyra IMAP every 15 minutes and pushes JSON to the comms-data Cloudflare Worker.

filters.q: is:unread (theo OR soccer OR football OR jayleen OR kyra OR BTB OR CDMFA)

nodes.name: POST all data to Cloudflare Worker

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ outlook: $('Transform Outlook data').first().json, gcalendar: $('Transform calendar events').first().json, gmail: $('Transform Gmail').first().json, calendar: $('Transform Google Calendar').first().json, zyra: $('Transform Zyra email').first().json }) }}

main.node: POST all data to Cloudflare Worker
